info.title: private-api-tools
info.description: A private copy of 'api-tools' until a new version with needed changes is released.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Use a more verbose output
Available commands:
api-info             Generate API info XML for assemblies.
diff                 Compare two assemblies.
merge                Merge multiple .NET assemblies.
nuget-diff           Compare two NuGet packages.
